steps.title: Identify whether the name is essential
steps.content: No specific novelist has been previously mentioned, so “Stephen Graham Jones” is essential to identify which novelist the editors turned to—making this a restrictive appositive.

steps.title: Apply the rule for essential appositives
steps.content: When an appositive is essential to identify the noun, no punctuation separates them—choice A follows this rule. Choices B and D incorrectly add commas (treating it as non-essential information), and choice C breaks the sentence with a period. That matches choice A — A is correct.
